programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: As Nat's weekend getaway continues, one lady leaves in a shock exit. At the Farmer Games, Nat announces a game changing prize that leaves one farmer torn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg of the Race, the remaining four teams travel through Portugal, where they look to earn their place in the final.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Miami where, after nine countries, 18 cities and more than 29,000 miles, one team will be crowned the winners of The Amazing Race and receive the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: A lenient mum of unruly quadruplets and a no-nonsense mum of two highly-disciplined kids swap lives, turning their families' worlds upside down.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Smash And Grab and Happy Death Day
programme.desc: After feeling the cafeteria staff could use some organization, Darlene seeks to be manager of food services at Mark's college; Dan teaches housewives basic DIY home projects to make some extra money.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Toilet Hacks and The Management Trac
programme.desc: Darlene crashes Mark's college trivia night to prove how smart she is; Neville finds out the money he loaned Dan was used for something other than its intended purpose.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: The Australian Reptile Park operations manager, Tim Faulkner ropes Chris into a frightening mission in far north Queensland. A monster seven metre python called Big Mamma is living in the roof of a local boating club and the female paddlers are terrified. It's all up to the intrepid duo as they head to Cairns to try to capture the scary reptile.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A quick-thinking police officer in Sydney's infamous King Cross has rescued a twelve-week-old puppy and rushed her into the Bondi clinic. The puppy was found sweltering in forty-degree heat in a plastic handbag and the culprit has been arrested. Little Tilly soon finds a place in Chris' heart and home where she has a confrontation with the resident cat, George. Without a microchip, the search is on for her owner.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy's adversary is arrested when a juror who was bribed to throw the trial of a crime boss is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the son of Lorelei Mailer, famous stripper-turned-model and widow of a 90-year-old billionaire, drops dead on a dance floor, Detectives Logan and Wheeler question Lorelei and her companion Ronnie Chase. Just back from the hospital after having a baby girl, Lorelei is devastated by her son's death and mysteriously dies days later. Lawsuits over the family fortune make Ronnie an easy suspect, but DNA results may have the last word.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the case against a popular sports star falls through, Benson digs into the suspect's past to uncover additional victims. Velasco is disappointed when he meets one of his heroes.

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Twisted Bones in the Melted Truck
programme.desc: A human carcass with a gunshot wound has literally melted into the dashboard of a charred truck, but the team discovers that neither the fire nor the bullet killed him.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan gets a glimpse into her own life when the body of a brilliant and career-driven surgeon, whose life parallels her own, is found in a rough neighbourhood with multiple fractures in her skull. Will Brennan and Booth be able to figure out how she got there, and why?

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: Mary (Mary McCormack) learns all the joys of childbirth while protecting a courtesan from the gangster that impregnated her. Although Mary may be immune to her charms, can a seductress truly ever be trusted?

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: On the day of her sister's wedding, Mary (Mary McCormack) is flown to Miami in order to protect her least favorite witness from hired mercenaries.

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: Mary returns to WITSEC from maternity leave to find a new set of office dynamics. She must protect a witness who could take down one of the most powerful secret societies in the country.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Grant Chandler, a public advocacy lawyer, tries a case against the Army that ends up pitting Claudia Joy and Michael against each other in a courtroom. Pamela starts a new job. Frank is working in D.C. so Jeremy steps up and helps Denise around the house. Joan is concerned about her health.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Everyone on post is on high alert as Fort Marshall is on its 99th day without a fatality. Joan finally goes to the doctor and learns what is causing her symptoms. Denise is moved to dispatch duty at work and enlists Pamela's help to locate a caller in trouble. Trevor proves his leadership skills and gains the trust of the new men under his command, including Jeremy.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Pamela has doubts about Chase's new female neighbor. When Emmalin gets disappointing news about the recovery of her knee, Michael steps in to help. TJ is having a tough time at home, so Trevor appoints him man of the house but the gesture backfires on the family. Unexpected orders come down from the Pentagon that affects everyone at Fort Marshall.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Alastair shares an inner-city secret; Jillian embarks on an unforgettable steam train journey; Luke has a petite taste of Brisbane's French Festival.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: As our farmers whisk our ladies off on dates, Andrew makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: This program features 10 professional pet stylists competing in a series of pawsome themed challenges, revealing epic transformations of adored family pets. Hosted by Rebel Wilson.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The stylists are challenged to create the perfect cut focusing on shape. Which team will put the cute into 'acute' angles and wow judges Amber Lewin and Colin Taylor?

programme.title: The Intolerant Cooks
programme.desc: Join witty food intolerants as they create delicious recipes using fresh regional produce for those with food sensitivities.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: In the series premiere, a fashion conscious, fitness obsessed mum of six straight-A students, and a bus-dwelling, free-range mum of eight unschooled kids, swap lives and turn their families upside down.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Conners relish national cheeseball day as a family; Harris falls behind in her work duties at the Lunch Box; Darlene and Ben must figure out how to spend time together despite their schedules.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Campaign U-Turn and A Hard Write
programme.desc: Dan gets asked to write for a hardware magazine, making Ben long for his days as a writer; Jackie inserts herself into Louise's run for the school board when her retirement leads to too much free time.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A morning walk has gone tragically wrong for Tigger and his distressed owner Bernadette. A street cleaner spooked the five-year-old and sent him charging into a car. Chris is trying to calm them both down to find out the extent of Tigger's injuries.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Ziggy is a dog with an embarrassing problem. A huge mass is hanging off his back leg. Bemused vet nurse Neil tells us it's like \.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body found in a restaurant dumpster leads Catherine and Brass into the world of competitive eating. Meanwhile, Nick and Sara investigate the double murder of a husband and wife literally torn apart by man's best friend.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh could find herself in trouble after she is involved in an off-duty shooting. Meanwhile, the shooting leads detectives to a separate murder, which is connected to drug dealers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: An unidentifiable body is discovered in the shower of an upscale home belonging to a young female socialite. With the help of a nosey bones expert, skeletal reconstruction and evidence in the drain, it is revealed that the victim was a young girl employed by a counterfeit handbag distributor. Will the team find and interrogate the right suspects? Meanwhile, Angela and Hodgins discuss where they would like to raise their family, and Booth opens up to Hannah.

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: Mary must juggle WITSEC with her new childcare duties after a hoarder witnesses a violent murder. Some say it takes a village; for a US Marshall, it takes the entire office.

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When Marshall's witness escapes from the WITSEC offices and disappears on an Indian Reservation, Mary and Marshall will need the help of a Native American detective to track him down.

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: Mary protects a bigamist not only from his former employer, but also his two wives. In WITSEC, cheating the black market can be dangerous; but cheating on multiple wives is a death sentence.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: With deployment around the corner, the families are all struggling in their own ways. Denise and Frank find out the sex of the baby. Joan has a particularly hard time dealing with her recovering and inability to deploy with her unit. Pamela explores the idea of dating again.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: The tribe adjusts to a \.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Emmalin gets permission to return to the ice and meets a new friend who helps her make a highlight video to college coaches. Joan gets clearance from her doctor's to spend her first full day alone with Sarah Elizabeth. Pamela finds herself participating in a speed-dating event at the Hump Bar. In the homestretch of her pregnancy, Denise is uncomfortable and unable to sleep due to the stress of Frank and Jeremy being overseas.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Karni takes to the skies above the Gold Coast. Jess discovers what is now inside the Old Redcliffe Fire Station, while Katrina Blowers from 7NEWS shares what she does in her downtime.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: Our farmers' families come to lunch and discover they must choose one lady to send on a crucial 24-hour date. Who will win an entire day and night with their farmer?

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: The stylists continue to tackle more challenges and attempt to wow the judges. Watch as these pups are transformed from ordinary to extraordinary.

programme.title: Rebel Wilson's Pooch Perfect
programme.desc: You're invited to the fanciest pooch party in town. The groomers are challenged to show grace and class as they transform the pets into posh pooches.
